subcodes.first_line: The Book which thou didst send unto the servant in attendance before the Throne hath been read before Our face, and We have found therein that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد قرء لدی الوجه کتاب الذی ارسلته الی العبد الحاضر لدی العرش و وجدنا منه ما
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
